deploySettings.title: Deploy Settings
deploySettings.description: Configure extension deployment method. The installation guide shown to users will change based on this setting.

auto.label: Auto Deploy (GWS/AD)
auto.description: Extension is automatically installed on user browsers via Google Workspace or Active Directory.

webstore.label: Chrome Web Store
webstore.description: Users install the extension directly from the Chrome Web Store.

extensionGuide.title: Extension Installation Guide
extensionGuide.description: Please install the extension required for your work.

auto.title: Extension will be installed automatically
auto.description: Your administrator has configured auto deployment. The extension will be installed automatically on your browser.
auto.step1: Restart your browser and the extension will be installed automatically.
auto.step2: After installation, click the extension icon and verify with your company email.
auto.step3: Once verified, the extension will start working automatically.

webstore.title: Install from Chrome Web Store
webstore.description: Install the extension from the Chrome Web Store using the link below.
webstore.step1: Click the button below to go to the Chrome Web Store.
webstore.step2: Click 'Add to Chrome' to install the extension.
webstore.step3: After installation, click the extension icon and verify with your company email.

manual.title: Install Extension Manually
manual.description: Download the build file and install it manually.
manual.noBuilds: No build files available yet. Please contact your administrator.
manual.step1: Click the button below to download the extension ZIP file.
manual.step3: Type chrome://extensions in the Chrome address bar.
manual.step4: Enable 'Developer mode' in the top right corner.
manual.step5: Click 'Load unpacked' and select the extracted folder.
manual.step6: Click the extension icon and verify with your company email.

installBanner.title: Extension not yet installed
installBanner.description: Please install the extension for accurate SaaS usage tracking.

auto.message: The extension will be installed automatically soon. Try restarting your browser.
